arabic_text:
امام
وادی مغفق
وادی فارغ
ضمیر
بازوں
محبت
نکاح
صورت
english_text:
Imam
Valley of Mughfaq
Valley of Faragh
Conscience
Pigeons (Bazoon)
Love
Nikah (marriage)
Form
alt_text: A concentric mandala-like diagram with 'امام' (Imam) at the center. Surrounding it are radial sections labeled with valleys (Mughfaq, Faragh), conscience (ضمیر), love (محبت), nikah (marriage), and multiple 'صورت' (Form) labels on outer petals. A human silhouette sits below the mandala on the right. Decorative arrows enclose pairs of small circles at the top.
notes: Composite cosmological diagram about the soul's journey through valleys, love, marriage, and form, centered on the Imam. Some Urdu labels difficult to disambiguate at native resolution — Phase 0b should consult the section text for precise correspondences.
